<?php require(__DIR__.'/../src/Twilio/autoload.php'); use Twilio\Rest\Client; $sid = getenv('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'); $token = getenv('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'); $client = new Client($sid, $token); // Get last 10 records $recordList = $client->usage->records->read([], 10); foreach ($recordList as $record) { print_r("Record(accountSid=" . $record->accountSid . ", apiVersion=" . $record->apiVersion . ", asOf=" . $record->asOf . ", category=" . $record->category . ", count=" . $record->count . ", countUnit=" . $record->countUnit . ", description=" . $record->description . ", endDate=" . $record->endDate->format("Y-m-d H:i:s") . ", price=" . $record->price . ", priceUnit=" . $record->priceUnit . ", startDate=" . $record->startDate->format("Y-m-d H:i:s") . ", uri=" . $record->uri . ", usage=" . $record->usage . ", usageUnit=" . $record->usageUnit . "\n"); }
